reviews.title: The worst customer service for a 4*hotel. DO NOT STAY HERE.
reviews.text:
On Nov 14, 2023
After more than 3 hours traveling to the hotel, we were really exhausted, with 2 large luggages to wheel in when it was raining, there is no porter at the door to help, but there were 3 men and one woman behind the reception desk and 2 women wandering in front of the desk; they all just stared at us and offered NO HELP.
Once at the desk we asked if there were any drink to fresh up .. The answer is “no, it is for MEMBERS only” .. HOW EXPENSIVE IS IT for 2 GLASSES OF ICED WATER at a 4* hotel?
They were more like forcing us to buy breakfast right now for 15USD to him or pay at the restaurant for 25USD .. Sound very fishy so we declined.
The room we reserved come with 2 full beds but they gave us 2 TWINS . We told them that it was not what we wanted.  We liked to check out the next day and moved somewhere else. Since they asked me to pay in full at check in for 4 nights, they refused to refund my three un-used nights but still didn't offer to move us to a room with 2 full beds.
The room was very small, there was not enough space to walk around, I hit the corner of the wooden bed frame and bled. I asked the front desk for first aid .. They didn't have any but offered to buy if I paid. A 4* HOTEL WITH NO FIRST AID FOR CUSTOMER .. This is absurd.
There were only 2 towels provided, one for the floor and one for 2 people to share .. I guess they have no perception of NOT SHARING TOWEL. After we showered, the water leaked out underneath the glass door making the floor very slippery and dangerous.
I rented a motorbike, but I had to ask for free validation everytime I took the bike out. If I took the bike out of the parking lot 10 times I had to walk to the front desk 10 times to get 10 separate validation. This is not a good way of managing their employee time and wasting the customer time, a very idiotic business conduct and operation.
With all the negativities mentioned, I have to admit the bathroom is clean, so I give it a 1 rating instead of 0 .. This place
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Lam Ky,

Thank you so much for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to give us your feedback.

First and foremost, please accept my sincerest apologies for the difficulties you have mentioned, and be assured that the experience you described does not reflect the usual quality of service we provide.

Regarding the welcome drink and room upgrade requests, it is worth emphasizing that members do not earn ALL points or enjoy member benefits when reservations are made through Online Travel Agencies (OTAs). I regret that we could not provide further assistance in this situation. About the water, we have several water fountains in the hotel, free to access, as well as complementary glass water bottles in the room.

Once again, we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused during your stay and appreciate you sharing your concerns. We do hope to have the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

Sincerely yours,

Marc DUPUIS,
General Manager

Dear Tasneem,
 
Thank you so much for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to give us your feedback.

reviews.positives: The location was fantastic. So close to the airport, but surrounded by a wide variety of local restaurants and shops. The pool area is beautiful and comfortable.
reviews.negatives: I messaged the property one week before our reservation and asked about a late check out because our flight didn't leave until 11pm. They told me the price, and I responded that I wanted it. When I checked in, they told us it wasn't available. We were disappointed to say the least, as it was a huge inconvenience for us, and we would have cancelled our stay and found a hotel that could accommodate it had they told us in advance and not when we checked in. reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: We chose the place as it is very close to the airport and offered shuttle bus services  airport pick up and drop off. However, the room was very small and the check-in area and lift with. no aircon and even though we advised the hotel before about our itinerary and booked the shuttle bus with the hotel before our trip and was told we can book the drop-off for domestic when we checked in which we did. The reception told us that the shuttle bus for both 6am or 6.30am are already full! I told him the reason why we booked the hotel because of the shuttle bus and we advised them way before. He did nothing to sort out and just said maybe the booking team missed it and didn’t provide any solutions but just said i can just book grab! Luckily, the guy at reception next morning managed to get us in but not impressed how the check-in handled the situation and added unnecessary stress to our trip.  Won’t come back

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: Overpriced hotel for rooms that are dated, tired, and generally not very well kept.  Check-in was exceptionally awkward with heavy promotion of Accor products and membership.  The curtains were stained, garbage can broken, and scuff marks and paint chipping from the walls.  The rooms are not soundproof as advertised -- you can hear noise from the hallways as well as cars/motorbikes beeping on the street.  The pipes were exceptionally loud with a rush of water surging in the middle of the night loud enough to be awoken from sleep.  There was a large bug in the bathroom.  The free shuttle is completely mismanaged and just plain a disaster.  Don't stay here - there are so many other places nearby and many are cheaper and presumably more organized.

reviews.title: Going down Hill
reviews.text: Been with this hotel since COVID-19.  It was great and the staff were excellent.  Unfortunately, since they've hired a new female manager (who works for the day shift), the customer service has gone bad.  Before, when I arrived at the hotel, a security officer helped me to carry the luggage, and a bellman helped me to bring my luggage to the room.   For the last two trips to Saigon, these services have been gone away.  Also, before, the previous manager and staff were very friendly, polite, and helpful.  Unfortunately, since the female manager took over, the customer service is not the same.  She did not even communicate with customers and supported my needs.  Her English was not good, but it can be understood.  However, her attitude and ignorance are unacceptable.  The room is also dirty and smells bad.  I do not think the supervisor really had checked it before assigning me this room.  Absolutely, I cannot support this hotel.

Sincerely,

Marc DUPUIS
General Manager

reviews.text:
For that money , you can find a better hotel even in downtown.
Its not deserved to be 4 stars hotel while i have to pull two luggages to the room by my self abd no one helped.
Agoda should not put ‘city view’ in the booking area while its not obviously ‘city view’. I booked standard queen room with city view, so i though that the room is supposed to be city view so i just requested for high floor and single bed, but when i checked in,the front desk gave me the room in 6 floor and the view is inside, so i asked them and they said because i didnt write special request, lol, and they think 6 floor is high???, so i askef them if they have city view room later, please inform me but i didnt.
So please if you wanna ask customer to write any request, so dont put wrong information in the booking site.
And also the bed is kind of not convenient, the room is small, and the bed is nearby the toilet, the i dont know why they design the bed frame is so sharp that my leg hit the corner several times and got injured :(

Dear CHEN, 

Thank you very much for your candid review of your recent stay at our hotel. Your feedback is extremely valuable to us, as we strive to improve with each and every stay. 

We are committed to providing the well-being for our guests with good facilities, service and comfortable atmosphere. We acknowledged that our guest deserves good value for every penny spent that we provide a flexible timing and fruitful breakfast. reviews.text:
Good Hotel but Staff Attitude in some Areas lets it down.
1. Requested Airport view room, but was told others before us had been allocated them. (We checked in within 1 Hr of being able to.

2. Rooftop Bar Staff were more intent on using their Mobile/Talking than serving. We had to go to bar to request drinks or order food. Others had Table Service.
3. On Saturday Night (not busy) our dirty meal plates and empty glasses were not cleared. They only cleared when table vacated.
4. Rooftop Bar allowed unfairly people to bring in their own drinks and Takeaways (eg Pizza). To enjoy by the pool. This is unfair on those who purchased Hotel food & Drink.
5. Good punctual Airport Transfer Service. As difficult to walk from Terminal. Book when booking and then at Reception thereafter.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text: Been to a few  Ibis airport hotels, and after this one, I won’t likely book them again. Because there are really no service or amenities worth the price ( no coffee, And BF doesn’t start until 6:30 which is way too late for those early AMs flights) and the front desk tried to charge us additionally half the room rate price of our rooms each  for checking in 3 hours early, even though they had plenty of rooms  empty and ready.   When we deferred and said we’d return and check-in later that evening , they tried to bargain it down to paying for half.    It’s this scam behavior in Vietnam Ibis hotel that leaves a bad impression of otherwise a pleasant experience with all other hotels we stayed at throughout Vietnam. We picked this place for the location convenience to SGN because we had a very early morning flight and were worried about taxi availability, since they have a shuttle service.  But we shouldn’t have bothered, because Grab cars is practically available within minutes in Saigon and there are so many other airport hotel options with better prices.

reviews.title: It’s a Time thing
reviews.text:
My sense is that this Ibis is a “yes” or a “no” depending on how long you’re staying.

Yes, if it’s an overnight stay in transit and you need to return to the airport. 

No, if you want something more than the barest minimum.

The best thing about the place is the staff. They know exactly why. clients are putting up with this wholly unappealing environment of yucchy overpriced fare, and that it seems to favour guests who love the horrid humidity of Ho Chi Minh’s prized and conquered satrap. 

Southeast Asians like me who can’t stand the heat and sweat of our own countries certainly desire good  air conditioning as a given.

Not this Frogified hotel, alas. 

So on balance, the hotel is decorated as only the French can. exploiting low class chic and transforming the place into overly eco-friendly, classy chic.

And the fantastic staff - Vietnamese efficient and hardworking to the bone.
reviews.response:

I greatly appreciate your comments about different aspects of the room and these candid opinions would be a guideline for us to define what we still need to improve on. We are also going to apply different training for our colleagues for service improvement and share with them your feedback as a lesson during their learning process. Our guests are our number one priority at the property and if someone is dissatisfied with their experience, we work very hard to correct this immediately and in a timely fashion in order to turn their experience around.
 
Once again, thank you for sharing your thoughts and we are looking forward to welcome you back in the near future at ibis

reviews.title: Good airport hotel for short stay with a great rooftop
reviews.positives:
I used this hotel for a 7hour layover instead of waiting at the airport, I was able to rest and refresh but did not actually stay the night so can’t comment on breakfast or noise overnight. 
Hotel was only a 5 minute walk from the airport however I wouldn’t recommend walking with luggage as the roads aren’t designed for pedestrians between the airport and the hotel (especially with big bag or kids). 
Hotel has a free shuttle to the airport which I utilized to return for my second flight. Staff were all lovely and helpful!

The bistro in the lobby was closed but the rooftop bar was great- with a rooftop pool, views of the city and good food I enjoyed sitting on the roof and having a meal.
There is also a Starbucks in the lobby. Good for a layover or short stay.
reviews.negatives: Room had all the basics but was nothing special. The room was quite small and bathroom was tiny. The shower wasn’t great and was a bit moldy but did offer basic toiletries. Some areas of the hotel weren’t air conditioned(corridors and elevators) and the air conditioning turned off once exiting the room which meant it got quite hot whilst out of the room. not an issue as I was only there for a short while.

Pre-booking the shuttle the hotel message said they’ll only wait up to 90 minutes from the time you land. However, the LINE for passport check/customs took almost 3 hours and they were gracious enough to wait. Complimentary water in the room was nice too. Hot water for shower was amazingly my and the bed was super comfortable as were the pillows. A much welcomed comfort after 20+ hours on flight guys+ 3 hours in customs line! Staff were cheery and helpful which at 3 am is pretty impressive!
